repositories.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Pack
findings: sam2 resolves from mutable git HEAD
installer downloads SAM when absent and mutates model/config directories
additional dependency code can invoke runtime pip install

repositories.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Subpack
findings: ultralytics lower bound is not an exact lock
installer downloads three models from mutable main URLs
safe-first torch loader can retry weights_only false for a base-filename-only whitelist
hash-bound whitelist and immutable model URL enforcement are absent

repositories.name: ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus
findings: runtime dependencies are inherited rather than declared
IPAdapterLoadEmbeds performs raw torch.load on user-selected ipadpt input

repositories.name: comfyui-controlnet-aux
findings: many model paths use raw torch.load
model downloads resolve mutable repository state by default
executed DWPose module contains an explicit CMU non-commercial-use notice

repositories.name: rgthree-comfy
findings: frontend build dependencies use semver ranges but built assets are retained in the pin

selected_dwpreprocessor.implementation_notice: src/custom_controlnet_aux/dwpose/__init__.py states that this preprocessor is licensed by CMU for non-commercial use only

required_sandbox_policy: resolve every dependency to an immutable artifact hash in an isolated environment
disable install.py model downloads and all runtime pip installation
allow network only for exact reviewed immutable URLs during environment construction
never authorize unsafe checkpoint fallback by filename alone
bind any exceptional checkpoint loader to exact path plus SHA-256 and execute first in a disposable no-secret no-network sandbox
replace or separately clear the non-commercial DWPose implementation before commercial activation
